subject: A robed human cleric with a halo-like radiance behind their head, holding a glowing weapon or implement aloft as light streams down around them
description: A solo human cleric stands in a beam of celestial light, eyes closed in serene devotion, a soft halo glowing behind their head. They wear flowing white and gold robes layered over fabric that drapes down past their waist. Their hands are raised, holding a small radiant object that emits white-gold light. The background is washed in pale gold and white luminance with hints of cloud and sky, suggesting a heavenly or sanctified space. Light beams angle down from the upper portion of the frame, bathing the figure in soft, holy illumination. The overall palette is dominated by ivory, cream, gold, and pale yellow, classic Plains/white-mana iconography.
foreground: robed human cleric with halo, hands raised holding a glowing implement
background: radiant heavenly light, pale clouds, beams of golden illumination
emotion: serene devotion, eyes closed in reverence, calm and prayerful
